action_set_definitions.name: get_telemetry_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the complete current telemetry suite for the pipeline segment, including pressure, inflow, outflow, pump speed, and component statuses.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_outflow_valve
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the opening percentage of the primary discharge valve to regulate internal pressure.

target_position.description: The opening percentage (0.0 for fully closed, 1.0 for fully open).

action_set_definitions.name: set_safety_vent_status
action_set_definitions.description: Commands the emergency pressure relief vent to a specific state.

status.description: The desired status of the vent.

action_set_definitions.name: modify_pump_speed
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies the rotational speed of the intake pump. Use only if telemetry suggests primary intake failure.

target_rpm.description: The desired RPM for the pump.

action_set_definitions.name: realign_secondary_components
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a mechanical realignment protocol for auxiliary secondary components in the segment.

action_set_definitions.name: reset_alarm_system
action_set_definitions.description: Deactivates the high-pressure anomaly alarm if the system state has returned to safe parameters.

action_set_definitions.name: trigger_emergency_shutdown
action_set_definitions.description: Initiates an immediate complete system shutdown. This action should be avoided unless structural failure is imminent.

state_description.current_pressure_psi: The current internal pressure of the pipeline segment in Pounds per Square Inch.
state_description.inflow_rate_lps: The rate of fluid entering the system in Liters per Second.
state_description.outflow_valve_position: The current opening percentage of the primary discharge valve (0.0 = closed, 1.0 = fully open).
state_description.pump_speed_rpm: The rotational speed of the intake pump in Revolutions Per Minute.
state_description.safety_vent_status: The status of the emergency pressure relief vent ('closed', 'open', or 'fault').
state_description.alarm_system_active: Indicates if the high-pressure anomaly alarm is currently triggered.
state_description.structural_integrity: A health score of the pipeline (1.0 = perfect, 0.0 = ruptured).
